arts.ttl: Tottenham join West Ham in race to sign Ajax striker Brian Brobbey this month
arts.sum: According to Fabrizio Romano, Tottenham Hotspur are the latest side to express their interest in Ajax’s Brian Brobbey. On Friday morning it was reported that West Ham had opened talks…

arts.ttl: Tottenham contact Ajax about potential Brian Brobbey transfer
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are actively exploring options to bolster their attack in the January transfer window, with Brian Brobbey emerging as a potential target. Tottenham’s quiet... The post Tottenham contact Ajax about potential Brian Brobbey transfer appeared first on Spurs Web.

arts.ttl: Man Utd offered Ten Hag favourite as Romano reveals West Ham battle
arts.sum: Man Utd offered Ten Hag favourite as Romano reveals West Ham battle In addition to the Hammers, Tottenham Hotspur are now also in the race for the signature of the 22-year-old attacker, reports Fabrizio Romano .
